name: Parallel Muon + Parameter Banking + Polar Express (82.08ms/step)
blurb: Systems optimization: 3.1% faster training (82.08ms vs 84.76ms, mean of 3 seeds) via Parameter Banking, Polar Express (arXiv:2505.16932), and Parallel Muon (no DDP, post-backward reduce-scatter + local PE + async all-gather). 7,311 steps vs 7,079 in 600s. Mean int6 sliding window val_bpb 1.1239 (std 0.0001). Built on PR #315 by @jfprincz.
author: abaybektursun
